title: Number Representation
objective: Represent and manipulate integers, negative numbers, fractions, powers, and roots. Compute 2^3 and store the result in particle.x.

title: Relations and Proportions
objective: Apply ratios, scales, and percentages. If particle.x is 100, compute 25% of its value and store in particle.y.

title: Functions
objective: Define a deterministic transformation function. Given input particle.x, compute output as 3*x + 2 and store in particle.y.

title: Fundamental Operations
objective: Apply addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

title: Basic Algebra
objective: Use variables to represent unknown quantities in equations.
